blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 86 ft. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
